summary: First testing iteration for HERPERT landing page MVP (React + FastAPI + MongoDB). 9/9 backend pytest tests pass; frontend UI flows (brand, hero, German copy, nav links, 6 interactive demo tabs, email mock actions + reset, contact form POST /api/leads) verified end-to-end and working.
critical_code_review_comments: Landing.jsx is ~1240 lines — consider splitting into per-section files (Hero, Suite, Demo, Modules, PartId, Contact, etc.) for maintainability.
Contact form error mapping reads err.response.data.detail[0].msg (FastAPI validation shape) but falls back to a generic message; would be more robust to handle both 422 and 5xx separately.
DemoLead.email is typed as str on the response model but validated as EmailStr on input — fine, but worth aligning for consistency.
No rate-limiting / spam protection on POST /api/leads; consider basic throttling for a public lead form.
datetime serialization in list_leads tries fromisoformat — works for documents inserted via this API but legacy/older documents could break; consider tolerating both.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on real flows (24/24 deterministic checks; 1 secondary invalid-email frontend retry was flaky due to form-reset timing but backend rejection + frontend error handler are both verified separately)

test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app.
seed_data_creation: Test created a handful of TEST_-prefixed demo leads via /api/leads to validate persistence (id, ordering, limit param). Safe to leave or purge.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend has 3 endpoints: GET /api/, GET /api/stats, POST /api/leads, GET /api/leads. All return JSON, MongoDB _id is correctly excluded in list_leads ({"_id":0} projection). Frontend is a single Landing.jsx component routed at '/'. Contact form posts to ${REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL}/api/leads via axios. All major data-testids (site-nav, logo-link, nav-*, hero-cta-*, suite-card-*, pipeline-step-*, demo-tab-{post|brett|bom|po|dashboard|meute}, demo-content-*, mail-{del|read|reply|star}-{id}, email-reset, brett-card-*, translation-{DE|EN|HU}, module-*, pricing-cta, contact-form, contact-name/company/email/role/message/submit) are present and working.
rca of the issue: No bugs found that needed RCA.
